data.name: Ingunn: A Swordmaiden Voyage
data.detailed_description:
Basic Info

Prepare to take control of Ingunn Ingimunsdottir in this Adult Action Adventure.

  • Battle enemies. 

  • Meet characters.

  • Diverse sex scenes.

First-person action gameplay.

Dialogue that evolves through player actions.

View sex scenes from either point-of-view and control the pace of the action.

Backstory

Ingunn is a fierce warrior raised in the frozen north by her father.
Her father was cursed, making him unable to have a son. 
His bloodline abilities could only be inherited by male offspring. 
So he struck a deal with the Witch of the woods, The witch would ensure his bloodline would continue in his daughter, and in exchange his daughter would ensure the eradication of hostile faiths in the north.

The moment her father passes, Ingunn would inherit her fathers manhood. And the time is nigh.

Now it's up to you. As Ingunn you will decide the course she will take. 
Will you honor the deal Ingunns father made.
Or forge your own path?

data.short_description: A First-person Action Adventure set in the frozen north with plenty of spicy scenes. Play as Ingunn, who has inherited her dead fathers burdens through a witches spell, and must now ensure the continuation of the bloodline.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6600K, AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050, AMD Radeon RX 460
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
